$comment: agr-launchpad project MCP servers. After you trust the folder, Claude Code asks you to approve EACH server once - approve only the ones you want (chrome-devtools is optional; decline it if you don't need browser debugging). SECRETS: Claude Code expands ${GITHUB_PAT} from the environment of the shell that LAUNCHES it - it does not read .env automatically. Store the token in .env (copy .env.example -> .env, never committed), then load it before launching: `set -a; source .env; set +a; claude` - or use direnv. context7 = live docs; github = your repos/issues/PRs (GitHub's official hosted MCP server); jupyter = live notebook kernel (run `make jupyter`); chrome-devtools = let Claude open pages, take screenshots, and read console/network output to verify UI work.
